news.title: Goliath Ventures CEO Pleads Guilty to $250M Crypto Ponzi Scheme
news.summary: Christopher Delgado’s "liquidity pool" fraud took in at least $400 million, with the proceeds spent on mansions, Lamborghinis, and Rolexes.

news.title: Former Goliath Ventures CEO pleads guilty in $400M crypto Ponzi case
news.summary: Former Goliath Ventures CEO Christopher Delgado pleaded guilty to fraud and money laundering and agreed to forfeit properties, vehicles, luxury goods and crypto wallets.

news.title: Binance and CZ sued in London by 1,700 UK investors
news.summary:
> Article except.

Almost 1,700 British investors are seeking at least £150 million, or about $200 million, from Binance and Changpeng Zhao, according to Reuters. The case was filed in London’s High Court and names Binance Holdings, UAE-registered Nest Exchange, Zhao and “persons unknown” linked to the Binance trading platform.
